skills.name: Flowering
skills.effect_text:
Discover more
Doll
Handbags & Purses
coffee
Evasion - CaptionRatio % per stack
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Fallen Blossom
skills.description: Teleport to the closest enemy inflicted with [Flowering], dealing damage. Fallen Blossom hits enemy multiple times based on debuff stack, lifting [Flowering] debuff. 5 stacks of Flowering slows enemy down for 5 seconds.

skills.name: Flash
skills.description: Lunge forward piercing enemies on the path.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 6 times
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Blossom Slash
skills.description: Hack an enemy with lightning speed. Become invulnerable during use.

skills.name: StartUp
skills.description: Receive 50% reduced damage while it is active. Increases Critical Damage temporarily based on the charging time upon end. Taking much damage lifts StartUp and stuns you for 2 seconds with 30% decrease in HP.
skills.effect_text:
Max final damage on Critical hit + CaptionRatio %
Buff Duration CaptionTime seconds
Max Duration: 2 seconds

attributes.name: Fallen Blossom: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Fallen Blossom] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Fallen Blossom: Seal
attributes.description:
* Inflicts [Silence] to enemy with 3 stacks of Flowering

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Control Blade: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Control Blade] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Flash: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Flash] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Flash: Rush
attributes.description:
* Decreases [Flash] Cooldown by 5 seconds when the skill lands as a critical hit (Effect Cooldown: 15 sec)

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Blossom Slash: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Blossom Slash] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Fallen Blossom: Enhanced Upgrade

attributes.name: [Arts] Blossom Slash: Enhanced Upgrade

attributes.name: [Arts] Control Blade: Hiten Blade
attributes.description: * Manipulate blossom blades to slash enemies in range at once with 50% decreased damage

attributes.name: StartUp: Blossom Shower
attributes.description: * Increases the number of hits of [Control Blade], [Fallen Blossom], and [Blossom Slash] by 1 during the buff when [StartUp] is fully charged

attributes.name: [Arts] Fallen Blossom: Blossom Flows)
attributes.description:

* Increases Cooldown by 10 seconds
